title: DonutSMP+
description: A lightweight PVP client for DONUTSMP focused on extremely high FPS and no lag. Best possible server experience out there.
body:
_DonutSMP+_ modpack is a lightweight, **high-performance** PVP client for Minecraft Java Edition. It is designed to maximize FPS, reduce input lag, and provide clear visual and gameplay advantages without giving unfair abilites. Core optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, and Noisium greatly improve game performance and memory usage, making the client run smoothly even on lower-end systems. Iris is included for optional shader support without at all sacrificing stability.

**Many of these mods are used by well-known Youtubers such as DrDonut, Dream, Preston Plays, Forge Labs, and many more!**

It also focuses on **competitive quality-of-life** features. Mods such as Custom HUD, AppleSkin, Potion Counter, Totem Counter, Shulker Box Tooltip, and More Chat History give players better awareness of combat, inventory, and status effects during fights. Visual improvements through Entity Model Features, Entity Texture Features, Continuity, and Better Animations enhance clarity while keeping the game clean and readable. Mod Menu, Reeses Sodium Options, Mouse Tweaks, and Borderless Fullscreen are included for better control and overall customization.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_DonutSMP+_ provides a **clean, fast, and reliable** PVP-focused experience for players who want strong performance, useful combat tools, and optional visuals without unnecessary bloat.
